meaning: adj.令人痛苦的,(味觉、嗅觉方面)刺激的、辛辣的,尖锐的,剧烈的
examples: Her face was a poignant reminder of the passing of time.
These include comedy, satire, poignant drama, historical and regional drama.
One of the most poignant sights awaiting visitors is the funfair, which was due to open just a few days before disaster struck.
It made the blues even more mournful, even more poignant and even more cathartic for anyone listening.
This is especially poignant to Korea, a society that is changing faster than many others.
